Bash("C:\\Python314\\python.exe" -c "
from ag3ntwerk.modules.workbench.security import sanitize_file_path
try:
    result = sanitize_file_path\(''/absolute/path.txt''\)
    print\(f''No error, result: {repr\(result\)}''\)
except ValueError as e:
    print\(f''ValueError: {e}''\)
")
Bash(else echo "signal dir does not exist at src level")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: ag3ntwerk AI Agent Platform

Features:
- 21 AI agent agents \(Nexus, Forge, Keystone, Echo, etc.\)
- Task orchestration and workflow engine
- 37 pre-built cross-functional workflows
- Plugin architecture with hot-reload support
- Learning system with pattern recognition
- Real-time analytics dashboard
- Webhook system with batching and DLQ
- Vector store integrations \(pgvector, ChromaDB\)
- Task queue with SQLite persistence

Recent improvements:
- Fixed asyncio.iscoroutinefunction deprecation warnings
- Refactored Nexus agent \(extracted routing, health, learning modules\)
- Split workflows.py into 8 domain-organized files
- Fixed race condition in task queue dequeue
- Fixed retry logic wiring in TaskQueueManager
- Added idempotency for complete/fail operations
- Fixed memory leak in performance tracking
- Added wildcard hook dispatch support
- Fixed purge_completed preserving DLQ
- Fixed hot reload hook registration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix code review issues: safety and robustness improvements

Fixes:
- Fix asyncio.Lock\(\) created at module level \(http_client.py, shutdown.py\)
  Now uses lazy initialization to avoid "no running event loop" errors

- Add SQL injection prevention for pgvector table names
  Validates identifiers against safe pattern before use in queries

- Fix unsafe deque deletion in webhook DLQ retry
  Properly recreates deque instead of deleting by index

- Add error handling for PostgreSQL result parsing
  Handles unexpected result formats gracefully

- Fix missing null checks for array access \(ecommerce_bridge.py\)
  Safely handles empty variants/prices lists

- Add thread-safe webhook manager initialization
  Uses double-check locking pattern to prevent race conditions

- Add exponential backoff to scheduler loop
  Prevents tight loop on repeated failures, backs off up to 60s

All 2101 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
